name: Chilled Vichyssoise/ Cold Leek and Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 quarts white stock, chicken stock or canned chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer vegetables in stock or broth.
2. Puree the soup either in blender or processor.
3. Stir in the cream. Season to taste, oversalting very slightly as salt loses savor in a cold dish.
4. Chill.
5. Serve in chilled soup bowl and decorate with minced chives.
